examples: He knew that once he hit the hill, he’d be easy caught up and the wolf’s teeth would be tearing into his flesh.
Alice was in a tearing hurry as usual.
Her pregnancy was tearing the family apart.
Now Pfizer is rebuilding its data center, tearing out high-priced Sun servers and installing low-end Intel machines.
While tearing down a wall, Mr Gonzales found newspapers from the 1930s used as insulation.
